title: Peng Lai
content:
Peng Lai
 is a continent in the 
Rank 5 Region
 where the 
Treasured Jade Sect
 is established.

The size of Peng Lai is at least a dozen times larger than 
Mo Luo
. It is more appropriate to call it a half a cultivation planet.

The Treasured Jade Sect only received it because an ancestor 20,000 years ago had achieved great merit and this was given to them by the rank 9 Ghost Sect.
